nodes.name: Write Patch Webhook
nodes.notes: Claude (via MCP or manual) POSTs patch here. OdTauLai picks it up on next Pull.

endpoints.push: POST /webhook/odtaulai-push  — OdTauLai pushes task snapshot here
endpoints.pull: GET  /webhook/odtaulai-pull  — OdTauLai polls for Claude's pending updates
endpoints.patch: POST /webhook/odtaulai-patch — Claude POSTs task updates here

how_to_use_from_claude_chat: 1. In OdTauLai → Settings → Claude Integration, enter your n8n Push and Pull URLs
2. Click 'Push to Claude' — this sends your full task list to n8n
3. In this Claude chat, paste your tasks or ask Claude to fetch them via n8n MCP
4. Claude analyzes and POSTs a patch to /webhook/odtaulai-patch
5. Click 'Pull Updates' in OdTauLai — updates apply instantly
